pi_items.source: Web search for Esrange Space Center / Kiruna coordinates and confirmed direct match with prompt instructions.
Web search for Esrange Space Center / Kiruna coordinates and confirmed direct match with prompt instructions.
Web search for Esrange Space Center altitude and confirmed direct match with prompt instructions.
Web search confirmed exact NORAD IDs for NOAA 18 (28654), NOAA 19 (33591), METOP-B (38771), and METOP-C (43689).

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the requested ground station coordinates for Kiruna (Esrange Space Center) are precisely latitude 67.8903, longitude 21.0806, and altitude 330m, exactly matching the explicit prompt instructions. Additionally, verified that the NORAD IDs for the required satellites are correct: NOAA 18 (28654), NOAA 19 (33591), METOP-B (38771), and METOP-C (43689). Discovered that while METOP-B and METOP-C TLEs are updated via the local weather.txt data feed, the NOAA 18 and NOAA 19 TLEs are absent from the feed but remain accessible via Gpredict's built-in 2018 satellites.dat catalog.
